title: stephanodoria tomentella
intro: Stephanodoria tomentella, also known as the velvet stephanodoria or velvet woodrose, is a species of flowering plant in the family Bignoniaceae. It is a climbing vine native to tropical Africa, valued for its medicinal properties and health benefits. The plant is traditionally used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Stephanodoria tomentella can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health issues, including digestive problems and respiratory infections.
